title: hypericum limosum
intro: Hypericum limosum, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant in the Hypericaceae family, native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hypericum limosum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for wound healing, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Hypericum limosum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
